instruction: The green checkmark on the align right icon got recolored slightly-darker black. Restore its original color.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/align-right.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><line x1="21" y1="10" x2="7" y2="10"/><line x1="21" y1="6" x2="3" y2="6"/><line x1="21" y1="14" x2="3" y2="14"/><line x1="21" y1="18" x2="7" y2="18"/></g>
  <polyline id="check" fill="none" stroke="#212121" stroke-width="3" fill="none" points="88,24 98,34 114,18" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/align-right.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><line x1="21" y1="10" x2="7" y2="10"/><line x1="21" y1="6" x2="3" y2="6"/><line x1="21" y1="14" x2="3" y2="14"/><line x1="21" y1="18" x2="7" y2="18"/></g>
  <polyline id="check" fill="none" stroke="#22c55e" stroke-width="3" fill="none" points="88,24 98,34 114,18" />
</svg>
